3:
Denston stands ready to bear you and your comrades over to Hullbreaker Isle. After arriving, fight your way to the wreck of the <Emphasis>Haar</Emphasis>, and obtain Mistbeard's coffer.

※Hullbreaker Isle can be accessed via the Duty Finder.
